meta.summary: GffRead converts, filters, validates, and extracts sequences from GFF/GTF transcript annotations.
meta.description: GffRead converts, filters, validates, and extracts sequences from GFF/GTF transcript annotations.

test: gffread -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'gffread v0.12.9. Usage:' >/dev/null && gffread -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--gtf' >/dev/null && gffread -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-w <exons.fa>' >/dev/null && gffread -h 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--table' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gffread-convert && cd /tmp/taf-gffread-convert && printf '%b\n' '##gff-version 3' 'chr1\tsmoke\tgene\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tID=gene1;Name=gene1' 'chr1\tsmoke\tmRNA\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tID=tx1;Parent=gene1' 'chr1\tsmoke\texon\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tParent=tx1' 'chr1\tsmoke\tCDS\t1\t39\t.\t+\t0\tParent=tx1' > ann.gff3 && gffread ann.gff3 -T -o ann.gtf && test -s ann.gtf && grep -F 'transcript_id "tx1"' ann.gtf >/dev/null && gffread ann.gff3 --bed -o ann.bed && test -s ann.bed && grep -F 'tx1' ann.bed >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gffread-fasta && cd /tmp/taf-gffread-fasta && printf '%b\n' '##gff-version 3' 'chr1\tsmoke\tgene\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tID=gene1;Name=gene1' 'chr1\tsmoke\tmRNA\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tID=tx1;Parent=gene1' 'chr1\tsmoke\texon\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tParent=tx1' 'chr1\tsmoke\tCDS\t1\t39\t.\t+\t0\tParent=tx1' > ann.gff3 && printf '%s\n' '>chr1' 'ATGGCCATTGTAATGGGCCGCTGAAAGGGTGCCCGATAG' > genome.fa && gffread ann.gff3 -g genome.fa -w transcripts.fa -x cds.fa -y protein.fa && test -s transcripts.fa && test -s cds.fa && test -s protein.fa && grep -F '>tx1' transcripts.fa >/dev/null && grep -F '>tx1' cds.fa >/dev/null && grep -F '>tx1' protein.fa >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-gffread-merge && cd /tmp/taf-gffread-merge && printf '%b\n' '##gff-version 3' 'chr1\tsmoke\tgene\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tID=gene1;Name=gene1' 'chr1\tsmoke\tmRNA\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tID=tx1;Parent=gene1' 'chr1\tsmoke\texon\t1\t39\t.\t+\t.\tParent=tx1' 'chr1\tsmoke\tCDS\t1\t39\t.\t+\t0\tParent=tx1' > ann.gff3 && gffread --merge ann.gff3 -o merged.gff3 && test -s merged.gff3 && grep -F '##gff-version 3' merged.gff3 >/dev/null && grep -F 'tx1' merged.gff3 >/dev/null
